Atlas_TextCodes
Atlas_Transitions
Atlas_Weather

quests.name: Market Introduction
quests.shortDesc: Speak with the merchant for Elder Rowan.
quests.desc: Elder Rowan asked you to stop by the crossroads merchant and confirm that the village supply crates arrived safely.

quests.name: Tilda's Tonic
quests.shortDesc: Bring Tilda a Potion from the village shop.
quests.desc: Tilda in the cottage is feeling faint and asked for a single Potion. Buy one from the merchant and bring it to her.

quests.name: Wolf Hunt
quests.shortDesc: Defeat two dusk wolves in Whispering Cave.
quests.desc: Hunter Vale wants the road north made safer. Defeat two dusk wolves in Whispering Cave, then return to him for your reward.
quests.failText: Hunter Vale hired another hunter after too many losses, so the original reward is gone.

quests.name: Bad News Travels
quests.shortDesc: Bring Elder Rowan news of Vale's replacement hunter.
quests.desc: After failing the wolf hunt, Hunter Vale asks you to let Elder Rowan know that someone else took the contract.

commands.name: Elder Rowan
commands.text:
Welcome to \c[2]Meridian Village\c[0], traveler.
Before you head north, would you greet our merchant
and make sure his supply crates arrived?

commands.name: Elder Rowan
commands.text:
Press [b]Z[/b] or [b]Enter[/b] to talk and confirm.
Press [b]X[/b] or [b]Esc[/b] to open the menu.

commands.name: Elder Rowan
commands.text:
Please check in with our merchant by the crossroads.
He has supplies waiting for the village.

commands.name: Elder Rowan
commands.text:
You've already helped the village settle in.
Tilda has been asking after you as well.

commands.name: Elder Rowan
commands.text: So Vale sent you with the news? I appreciate the honesty.

commands.name: Villager
commands.text:
The pond is lovely this time of year.
Just don't fall in \i[15]!

commands.name: Hunter Vale
commands.text: Have you dealt with two dusk wolves in the cave yet?

commands.name: Hunter Vale
commands.text:
You really did it? Excellent work.
I'll pay you right away.

commands.name: Hunter Vale
commands.text:
Those dusk wolves won't trouble the road for a while.
You have my thanks.

then.name: Hunter Vale
then.text:
Elder Rowan took the news better than I expected.
Thank you for smoothing things over.

then.name: Hunter Vale
then.text:
Please tell Elder Rowan I had to hire another sword.
I hate leaving him in the dark.

else.name: Hunter Vale
else.text:
I had to hire another hunter after those defeats.
Would you at least carry the news back to Elder Rowan?

then.name: Merchant
then.text:
Ah, Elder Rowan sent you? Good timing.
The supply crates made it in before sundown.

then.name: Merchant
then.text:
If you see Tilda in the cottage, tell her I'm still selling Potions.
She looked worried earlier.

commands.name: Merchant
commands.text: Welcome! Take a look at my wares.

commands.name: Bren
commands.text:
I'm Bren, a wandering cleric.
You look like you could use a healer.

branches.name: Bren
branches.text: I'll be here if you change your mind.

commands.text: The party rests. HP and MP restored!

A hulking orc blocks the way
to the glowing crystal!

else.text:
You touch the Whispering Crystal...
A warm light fills the party!

then.name: Tilda
then.text:
That Potion did the trick.
Thank you again for hurrying it over.

then.name: Tilda
then.text: You found a Potion? Oh, wonderful!

else.name: Tilda
else.text:
If you're heading through the village, could you bring me just one Potion?
The merchant should have plenty.

then.name: Tilda
then.text:
Since you're helping everyone... could you fetch me a Potion?
I'd pay you back, of course.

else.name: Tilda
else.text:
Make yourself at home!
The bed is free if you need a rest.

branches.text:
You take a short nap.
HP and MP fully restored!
